name: BeiJing Seeyon Internet Software Corp.
summary: BeiJing Seeyon Internet Software Corp. provides collaborative management software, solutions, and cloud services for organizational customers in China. It offers universal solutions covering process management, knowledge management, group control, portal management, and system integration; and business application solutions comprising cost budget, human resource, project, fixed asset, office equipment, procurement, document, conference, and sales management. The company also provides automotive, retail, IT service, clothing manufacturing, electronic, steel, food, pharmaceutical, and instrumentation industry solutions. In addition, it offers support services. The company was founded in 2002 and is headquartered in Beijing, China.
